objective: Split platform services into root compatibility facades plus focused src contracts/factories/probes. Main reuse objective: isolate shared value types/contracts (VoiceCapturePlatform, DeviceSpeechRecognitionDiagnostics, VoiceCaptureReadiness, DeviceSpeechRecognitionDiagnosticsProbe) for reuse by factory/readiness/probe without coupling callers to method-channel implementation.
completedSlices: Extracted device speech diagnostics/readiness/probe contracts into src/device_speech_recognition_contracts.dart and method-channel probe/parser into src/method_channel_device_speech_recognition_diagnostics_probe.dart; kept device_speech_recognition_availability.dart as compatibility export.
Extracted VoiceCapturePlatform value type into src/voice_capture_platform_contracts.dart; kept voice_capture_platform.dart as platform detection facade/export.
Moved default readiness checker implementation into src/default_voice_capture_readiness.dart; kept device_speech_recognition_availability.dart as compatibility export.
Moved default voice capture service factory into src/default_voice_capture_service_factory.dart; kept default_voice_capture_service.dart as compatibility export.
